author: Lily Ray
title: The AI Slop Loop
content: This post addresses the AI content generation feedback loop problem where misinformation persists and spreads. The article discusses how the September 2025 Google 'Perspectives' update that never actually existed continues to be cited by Large Language Models with complete confidence. The problem stems from fabricated content remaining indexed and being used as source material for new AI-generated content, creating a self-perpetuating cycle of false information.
